data.user_prompt: Which Louisville mental health websites have useful service and referral information?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response chat_gpt Which Louisville mental health websites have useful service and referral informa

sections.text:
**Searching referral directories**

I'm looking for more referral directories in Louisville, like Gilda's Club referral and the Deflection Hub. I'll check the LouisvilleKY page and consider adding the CHFS crisis page as well. I think about searching for the Peace Hospital crisis line but maybe that's not necessary. Adding Seven Counties sounds good, too. I just need to keep it brief, so I'll open the relevant website for more details.

**Gathering mental health resources**

I can't access more web sources, so I need to rely on existing ones. I'll compile a list of mental health services such as LouisvilleKY.gov for community support, 988.ky.gov for crisis intervention, CHFS for crisis prevention, and providers like New Vista, Wellspring, and Seven Counties from HDI. I should also mention Abibehavioral, Solace Life Change, and Astra Behavioral. It's important to include details about crisis lines, mobile crisis responses, and referrals while crafting this response.

Here are Louisville-area mental health websites that include **practical service/referral info** (hotlines, “how to get help,” and/or how to connect people to local services):

1) **LouisvilleKY.gov – Community Mental Health Services (Metro Louisville)**
   - Central Louisville guide with crisis/deflection guidance and links to local resources (including 988 references and other crisis options).
   - ([louisvilleky.gov](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services?utm_source=openai))

2) **Kentucky 988 (statewide) – “Call 988 | KY Suicide, Mental Health & Substance Abuse Lifeline”**
   - Tells you how 988 routes crisis calls in Kentucky and what kind of crises it covers; helpful as the first step for referral to appropriate local care.
   - ([988.ky.gov](https://988.ky.gov/?utm_source=openai))

3) **Kentucky CHFS (Cabinet for Health & Family Services) – Crisis Prevention & Response System**
   - Explains Kentucky’s crisis system and how you can access crisis support (including CMHC crisis hotlines and mobile crisis teams, with “find a walk-in location” guidance).
   - ([chfs.ky.gov](https://www.chfs.ky.gov/agencies/dbhdid/Pages/crisis.aspx?utm_source=openai))

4) **New Vista – Make a Referral**
   - Regional provider page that includes how to get started / referral pathways, plus service overview.
   - ([newvista.org](https://newvista.org/?utm_source=openai))

5) **Wellspring Mental Health (Louisville) – Contact / crisis line info**
   - Louisville-focused contact page with crisis line details (useful for direct referral and immediate support).
   - ([wellspringky.org](https://wellspringky.org/contact-us/?utm_source=openai))

6) **Seven Counties Services (Community Mental Health Center) – crisis + intake info**
   - Resource listing that includes their crisis phone lines and the organization’s role in the Louisville region.
   - ([resources.hdiuky.org](https://resources.hdiuky.org/resource/seven-counties-services-inc-community-mental-health-center/?utm_source=openai))

7) **Abi Behavioral Health (Louisville) – Contact page (includes crisis/information line)**
   - Includes phone contact and a “crisis and information” line plus referral-related info.
   - ([abibehavioralhealth.com](https://www.abibehavioralhealth.com/contact-us/?utm_source=openai))

8) **Solace Life Change – “Make a Referral / Get Started”**
   - Outpatient behavioral health/substance use treatment provider page with referral entry point.
   - ([solacelifechange.com](https://solacelifechange.com/?utm_source=openai))

9) **Astra Behavioral Health – Louisville services page**
   - Louisville location/services page (often useful for finding the right program and how to connect).
   - ([astrabh.com](https://www.astrabh.com/louisville?utm_source=openai))

If you tell me what you need (e.g., **adult vs youth**, **crisis vs routine therapy**, **insurance/self-pay**, and **substance use vs anxiety/depression vs psychosis**), I can narrow this to the 3–5 most relevant sites and what to do on each one.

annotations.title: Call 988 | KY Suicide, Mental Health, & Substance Abuse Lifeline
Crisis Prevention & Response System - Cabinet for Health and Family Services
New Vista: Mental Health & Substance Use Services
Contact Wellspring Mental Health in Louisville | Wellspring
KDR - Seven Counties Services, Inc. – Community Mental Health Center
Solace Life Change | Solace Life Change
Louisville Behavioral Health Services | Astra Behavioral Health
